title: A Letter to a Royal Academy
body: "A Letter to a Royal Academy" (sometimes referred to as "A Letter to a Royal Academy about Farting" or "Fart Proudly") is the name of an essay about flatulence written by Benjamin Franklin c. 1781 while he was living abroad as United States Ambassador to France. It is an example of flatulence humor.
